title: 🎉 Q1 2026 Town Hall — Register Now!
content: We're excited to announce our Q1 2026 All-Hands Town Hall on March 20th, 2026 at 3:00 PM IST. Join us as our CEO shares the company vision, product roadmap, and Q1 results. There will also be a live Q&A session. All employees are encouraged to attend. The event will be held virtually via Zoom. Registration link will be shared by March 15th.
author: Meera Nair

title: New Health Insurance Plans Effective April 2026
content: We're upgrading our health insurance plans! Starting April 1st, 2026, all employees will benefit from enhanced coverage including dental, vision, and mental health benefits. The coverage limit increases from ₹5L to ₹7.5L per annum. Detailed plan documents and enrollment instructions will be shared by HR by March 15th. Employees with existing dependents will need to re-enroll. Contact benefits@company.com for queries.
author: Meera Nair

title: Office Renovation — Wing B Closure (March 10-17)
content: The Wing B office space will undergo renovation from March 10 to March 17. Employees in Wing B will be temporarily relocated to Wing A or the co-working spaces on the 4th floor. WFH will be available for this period with manager approval. Please collect personal items before March 9th. IT support will be available to assist with the transition. We appreciate your patience!
author: Admin Team

title: Congratulations! We've Won the 'Best Employer 2025' Award 🏆
content: We are thrilled to announce that our company has been recognized as the 'Best Employer to Work For 2025' by the Great Place to Work Institute! This achievement reflects the collective effort of every single employee who makes this a wonderful place to work. A special celebration will be organized next week — details to follow. Thank you for making this possible!
author: CEO Office

title: L&D Budget Refresh — Submit Requests Before March 31st
content: Reminder to all employees: Your Learning & Development budget of ₹50,000 resets on April 1st. Unused budgets do not carry forward. Submit your training requests, course enrollments, or certification plans to your manager for approval before March 31st. Check the L&D policy for eligible expenses. New courses added to our learning portal this month include AWS Solutions Architect, PMP Exam Prep, and Advanced Python.
author: HR Learning Team

title: New Flexible Work Hours Policy — Starting March 2026
content: We're excited to introduce Flexible Work Hours starting March 1st, 2026! Employees can now choose their start time between 8 AM and 11 AM, maintaining 8 hours of work daily. Core collaboration hours remain 11 AM - 4 PM IST. This policy applies to all full-time employees. Part-time and contractual employees should check with HR. The updated attendance policy document is available on the HR portal.
author: Meera Nair

title: Welcome Our New VP of Engineering — Karthik Rajan!
content: We are delighted to welcome Karthik Rajan as our new VP of Engineering! Karthik brings 15 years of experience scaling engineering teams at top tech companies. He will be leading our engineering division and driving our technical strategy. A virtual meet-and-greet session will be organized on March 5th at 2 PM. Please join us in welcoming Karthik to the family!
author: CEO Office

title: Hackathon 2026 — InnovateX Registration Open!
content: Get ready to innovate! InnovateX 2026, our annual company hackathon, is happening on March 28-29, 2026. This year's theme is 'AI for Internal Productivity'. Teams of 2-4 members can register by March 15th. Exciting prizes worth ₹2 lakhs await winners! Workshops on AI tools and design thinking will be conducted before the event. Register at the hackathon portal and start forming your teams!
author: Innovation Team
